controls.name: NDA Requirement
controls.description: Non-disclosure agreement requirement for external sharing

T2.label: Not required
T2.detail: Use professional judgment when sharing externally

T3.label: Recommended
T3.detail: NDA recommended before sharing with external parties

T4.label: Required
T4.detail: NDA must be executed before any external access

controls.name: Encryption in Transit
controls.description: Requirements for encrypting data during transmission

T1.label: Standard
T1.detail: Standard HTTPS/TLS is sufficient for public information

T3.label: Required
T3.detail: TLS 1.2+ required; use encrypted email or secure file transfer for external sharing

T4.label: Required + Enhanced
T4.detail: TLS 1.3 preferred; end-to-end encryption required for external transfers; consider S/MIME or PGP for email

T1.label: Not required
T1.detail: No encryption requirements for public data

T2.label: Recommended
T2.detail: Platform-default encryption (e.g., Google Workspace built-in) is adequate

T3.label: Required
T3.detail: Data must be stored on encrypted volumes; full-disk encryption on endpoints

T4.label: Required + Enhanced
T4.detail: Encryption at rest required; consider client-side encryption or dedicated encryption keys for highly sensitive data

controls.name: Access Control
controls.description: Who can access the data and how access is managed

T1.label: Open
T1.detail: No access restrictions; available to all staff and may be shared publicly

T2.label: Role-based
T2.detail: Limit access to staff who need it for their role; use team-based Shared Drives

T3.label: Restricted
T3.detail: Named-individual access only; documented access list reviewed quarterly; MFA required

T4.label: Strictly Controlled
T4.detail: Named-individual access with documented business justification; access reviewed monthly; MFA required; audit logging enabled

controls.name: Mobile Device Controls
controls.description: Requirements for accessing data on mobile devices

T1.label: No restrictions
T1.detail: Standard device usage; no additional controls needed

T2.label: Basic controls
T2.detail: Screen lock required; remote wipe enabled via Google MDM

T3.label: Managed devices
T3.detail: MDM enrollment required; screen lock, encryption, remote wipe enforced; no data on personal devices without MDM

T4.label: Strictly managed
T4.detail: Organization-managed devices only; MDM with advanced policies; no personal device access; automatic lock after 2 minutes of inactivity

controls.name: Email Handling
controls.description: Guidelines for sending data via email

T1.label: No restrictions
T1.detail: May be sent via standard email to any recipient

T2.label: Use caution
T2.detail: Verify recipient addresses; avoid including in email signatures or auto-forwards

T3.label: Encrypted or confidential
T3.detail: Use Gmail Confidential Mode or encrypted attachments; verify recipient; do not include in email body when possible

T4.label: Restricted
T4.detail: Never send via standard email; use secure file sharing links with expiration; if email is unavoidable, use S/MIME or password-protected attachments with password sent separately

controls.name: AI Tool Usage
controls.description: Rules for processing data with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, etc.)

T1.label: No restrictions
T1.detail: Public information may be used freely with any AI tool

T2.label: Use caution
T2.detail: Avoid pasting large datasets; prefer AI tools with enterprise data agreements; do not upload files containing internal-only information

T3.label: Prohibited unless approved
T3.detail: Do NOT input into any AI tool unless it is on the organization's approved tool list with a signed data processing agreement. No consumer-tier AI tools.

T4.label: Prohibited unless approved
T4.detail: Do NOT input into any AI tool unless explicitly approved by leadership with a signed BAA or DPA. Even approved tools must be used with minimum-necessary data. Document all AI processing.

controls.name: Physical Mail
controls.description: Requirements for sending data via physical mail or courier

T1.label: Standard mail
T1.detail: May be sent via regular mail

T2.label: Standard mail
T2.detail: Regular mail acceptable; use sealed envelopes

T3.label: Tracked delivery
T3.detail: Use tracked/certified mail or courier with signature confirmation

T4.label: Secure courier
T4.detail: Secure courier with chain-of-custody tracking and recipient signature required; double-envelope for highly sensitive items

controls.name: Instant Messaging
controls.description: Rules for sharing data via Slack, Teams, Google Chat, or similar platforms

T1.label: Permitted
T1.detail: May be discussed freely on organizational messaging platforms

T2.label: Permitted with care
T2.detail: Use organizational platforms only (not personal messaging apps); avoid sharing in public channels unnecessarily

T3.label: Generally prohibited
T3.detail: Do not share via instant messaging; use secure file sharing or email with encryption instead. Brief references without full data are acceptable.

T4.label: Prohibited
T4.detail: Never share via instant messaging platforms under any circumstances; these platforms are not designed for this sensitivity level

controls.name: Remote Access
controls.description: Requirements for accessing data remotely (outside the office)

T2.label: Secure connection
T2.detail: Use organizational accounts; avoid public Wi-Fi without VPN; 2FA on accounts

T3.label: VPN + MFA
T3.detail: VPN required on non-organizational networks; MFA enforced on all access; no access from shared or public computers

T4.label: Managed access only
T4.detail: VPN required for all remote access; MFA enforced; managed devices only; context-aware access policies if available (Enterprise tier); no public Wi-Fi even with VPN

controls.name: Data Disposal
controls.description: Requirements for securely deleting or destroying data

T1.label: Standard deletion
T1.detail: Regular deletion from drives and trash; no special procedures required

T2.label: Empty trash
T2.detail: Delete files and empty trash; remove from Shared Drives when no longer needed

T3.label: Secure disposal
T3.detail: Permanent deletion with trash emptied; physical media must be securely wiped; maintain disposal log for audit purposes

T4.label: Verified destruction
T4.detail: Cryptographic erasure or certified destruction; maintain certificate of destruction; physical media must be degaussed or shredded; third-party verification for bulk disposal

controls.name: Labeling
controls.description: How to mark and label documents containing this data

T1.label: No labeling needed
T1.detail: Public information does not require classification labels

T2.label: Recommended
T2.detail: Label as 'Internal' in document header or Google Drive label if available; helps prevent accidental external sharing

T3.label: Required
T3.detail: Must be labeled 'Confidential' in document header/footer and via Drive labels; include handling instructions on cover page for multi-page documents

T4.label: Required + Visible
T4.detail: Must be labeled 'Restricted' or 'Highly Confidential' on every page header/footer, filename, and via Drive labels; include distribution list and handling instructions

controls.name: Printing
controls.description: Restrictions on printing documents containing this data

T2.label: Minimize printing
T2.detail: Prefer digital copies; collect printouts from printer promptly

T3.label: Restricted printing
T3.detail: Print only when necessary; use secure print (badge release) if available; shred printed copies when no longer needed; disable download/print in sharing settings when possible

T4.label: Prohibited unless approved
T4.detail: Do not print unless explicitly authorized; if printed, track all copies; shred immediately after use; disable download/print/copy via IRM controls

controls.name: Cloud Storage
controls.description: Requirements for storing data in cloud platforms

T1.label: Any platform
T1.detail: May be stored on any reasonable platform; organizational drives preferred but not required

T2.label: Organizational platforms
T2.detail: Store on organizational Google Drive or approved platforms; avoid personal cloud storage accounts

T3.label: Approved platforms only
T3.detail: Must be stored only on organization-approved cloud platforms with appropriate security controls; no personal Dropbox, iCloud, or consumer storage

T4.label: Restricted approved platforms
T4.detail: Approved platforms only with enhanced security; restricted Shared Drives with named access; enable audit logging; consider Vault retention policies if available

controls.name: Third-Party Sharing
controls.description: Requirements for sharing data with vendors, partners, or contractors

T1.label: No restrictions
T1.detail: Public information may be shared freely with any third party

T2.label: Professional judgment
T2.detail: Share on a need-to-know basis; verify the third party is legitimate; use organizational sharing tools rather than personal channels

T3.label: Agreement required
T3.detail: Data processing agreement or NDA required before sharing; limit to minimum necessary data; document what was shared with whom; verify third-party security practices

T4.label: Formal agreement + oversight
T4.detail: Signed DPA/BAA required; legal review of sharing agreement; third-party security assessment required; data minimization enforced; ongoing monitoring of third-party compliance
